samples:
I hope you know what you're thinking
Hope you know just what you said to me
If I thought that there was a way back, baby
Well, don't you worry 'bout the water rising, yeah


Cause it's rising anyway
Yeah, it's rising anyway
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Don't you worry about the water rising, yeah


Hope you know what you're thinking
Hope you know just what you said to me
It seems like every time we meet again
You try to push your will upon me
Push me around and then treat me mean
Then get all mad when I put my foot down
It's okay if I go out of control
So come on in and get some while I can handle this


Cause it's rising anyway
Yeah, it's rising anyway
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Don't you worry about the water rising

Just one question
How can I help?
How can I help you now?


Don't be scared, don't be scared
I have a plan to save the day
Trust me, trust me
My faith in you will see you through this all, yes


If you feel weighed down by negative thoughts 
Then we should talk about your demons
So come here
Learn from me how to overcome them


You could learn so much from me
I am full of light and love
And as such I must protect you
Please stay alive, child
Stay alive

Don't be scared, don't be scared
I have a plan to save the day
Trust me, trust me
My faith in you will see you through this all, yes


If you feel weighed down by negative thoughts 
Then we should talk about your demons
So come here
Learn from me how to overcome them


You could learn so much from me
I am full of light and love
And as such I must protect you
Please stay alive, child
Stay alive

Why don't you just leave me alone?
Don't you know I hate to get up from my sleep, get out of your fucking hole?


You want to fuckin' eat dirt and shit rocks? 
Fuck this shit. Fuck these dumb monkeys.  Yeah.

Why can't you stay in the ground? Don't ya wanna die? You must suck a dick. 
Please get off me. Please get away. No one wants to hear about it. Leave me alone. 
Fuck you. Get the fuck out. Get outta my fucking room. Stay out of my fucking bed. 
I am sick and tired of having to deal with this. Sick and tired of being awake. 
Sick and tired of being alive. This is getting old. Yeah. 


Get out. Go crawl back under my skin. You suck a dick. Learn something. Please learn something. 
Learn something or else. Learn something. Please learn something. Learn something or else.

A new day is dawning, hope comes down the barrel
Of a gun pointed at my head, this morning light will end me


New life coming to claim me, must I give it back? 
No way out, no choice but to listen and obey
The voice inside of me says "Listen"



Wake up baby
Don't you know your daddy needs some sleep tonight?

I said, "I need a little sleep". And you said, "See ya"
But then you said, "Please don't go away, or I'll die"




You wouldn't like it if someone else came along
Kinda takes the wind right out of me, keeps me awake all night long
If he was gone, so would I
And there's no one else I could lie with


Lying in my bed, thinking about it all
Thinking about it, thinking about it, thinking about it, yeah
Yeah, yeah
I need a little sleep

You're a parasite
You suck the life away from me
Suck my blood and suck my will to live


I feel so numb, I don’t wanna speak or move
Don’t wanna look at you or breathe anymore
‘Cause I must survive
Must survive this nightmare
My mind is playing tricks on me




If only I could sleep forever, no one would get hurt
No one would come between me and the end of this chore
Must survive
Must survive this nightmare
I must stay awake while these demons feed


Parasite, parasite
Parasite, parasite
Parasite, parasite
Parasite, parasite

All I wanna do is die
But I gotta keep trying
To save myself before it all disappears
And nothing left but dust
Feels like an eternity
Until my blood escapes this blood-sucking vampire




Must survive this nightmare
I must stay awake while these demons feed
Must survive this nightmare
I must stay awake while these demons feed

She said "Get the hell out of here"
And I said, "Well, you know where to find me."


I didn't want to see your face again. 
You tried to break my spirit down. 
You played all your cards on the table top 
Like we were playing a game called "Battle Ground." 


Don't take it personally if I leave right now 
This kind of thing doesn't suit me anyway. 
Don't take it personal if I call it quits 
This kind of thing is bound to bring me down. 


It took every ounce of strength in me 
Just to keep a smile upon my face. 
Every time I opened up and spoke 
All that came through was just an echo. 


Now I'm starting to come back down.  
My eyes are opening wide awake. 
My patience has finally come to an end. 
Now I must have what I wanted once. 


Yeah, it took every ounce of strength in me 
Just to keep a smile upon my face. 
Every time I opened up and spoke 
All that came through was just an echo.

I'm ready to face the undertow
Take what you will, use me and drain me dry
Pull my head underwater now
Drag me down to where you want me to be


Pushing and shoving, pushing and shoving
Swallowing mud with both lungs full
Trying to swim free but it seems there is no way out of here
Don't wanna breathe your water all over me


Leave me alone! Leave me alone! Leave me alone! Leave me alone!

Digging holes while breathing in circles
You suck life out of me and then bury me alive
Stranglehold upon me
And I can feel myself slowly die


Shoving my body beneath a cold muddy ground
Where I try to hide from this stormy weather outside
Breathing shallow and slow as I sink into you
My vision becomes blurry and I cannot move an inch

Leave me alone! Leave me alone! Leave me alone! Leave me alone!


If I could leave now, I would run away
Suck every drop of reason that you have left within
But I must swim through this slop until I come up for air
So please don't shove or push me under

Hey, hey
Hey-o-o-o-o-oh
Hey


Hey! Hey!
Hey-o-o-o-o-oh
Hey


Hey! Hey!
Hey-o-o-o-o-oh
Hey


Hey! Hey!
Hey-o-o-o-o-oh
Hey

Well now you're digging yourself a hole
Begging someone else to fix it all
And then you get mad when they don't point their finger at you
So sad, but true

You've got your head so far up your ass you think the center of the earth is made from gold
And everything is alright as long as no one calls you an asshole while you sleep in your hole
Yeah, we could dig out your ass and clean ya down with water or gasoline, either way would work
But I must admit that I quite like the view
See? It's kind of funny 'til you come crawling back begging for help


(Dig ya) Dig ya
(Dig ya) Dig ya
(Dig ya) Dig ya
(Dig ya) Dig ya

In between the lines of my prayers
I beg for patience to endure
Don't judge me, Lord, I didn't mean
Any harm in all my rambling around


Why do you test me so?
Why must I play this part?
You know better than I
What's right and what's wrong
Just let me breathe a sigh of relief
When we meet in another time and space

Now we enter the dream again
We crawl into the arms of Morpheus
He opens up his eyes, looks through us
Looks through us while he feeds on our pain

Why do you test me so?
Why must I play this part?
You know better than I
What's right and what's wrong
Just let me breathe a sigh of relief
When we meet in another time and space

Why do you test me so?
Why must I play this part?
You know better than I
What's right and what's wrong
Just let me breathe a sigh of relief
When we meet in another time and space

I know you well enough to guess
That I'll be thinking of you, babe
I wish I could have more than just your picture
You keep reminding me of things I must leave behind


"Don't call me while I'm workin'
Don't call me while I'm sleepin'
Don't call me while I'm thinkin'
Don't call me while I'm dreamin'
Don't call me while I'm eatin'
Don't call me while I'm dreamin'"


I am in tune with you
I can feel your love for me
When we are together, we are one
And it's a feeling that I need


Call me while I'm workin'
Call me while I'm sleepin'
Call me while I'm thinkin'
Call me while I'm dreamin'
Call me while I'm eatin'
Call me while I'm dreamin'

Call me while I'm workin'
Call me while I'm sleepin'
Call me while I'm thinkin'
Call me while I'm dreamin'
Call me while I'm eatin'
Call me while I'm dreamin'


I cannot wait until the time arrives
We are one
My baby is coming home
